title: Freeze read-model API parity contract and verification harness

red_green.baseline: pytest -q tests/test_mission_read_model.py tests/test_mission_read_model_api.py tests/test_mission_dual_write_verify.py tests/test_mission_dual_write_journal_audit.py -> 1 failed, 42 passed; known migrated phase_label EXECUTE_QUEUE vs READY
red_green.red: new verifier/audit contract tests failed with KeyError for not_found/error_count/invalid_json and missing normalized option finding; malformed run.json initially exited successfully with error_count=0
red_green.green: pytest -q tests/test_mission_read_model.py tests/test_mission_read_model_api.py tests/test_mission_dual_write_verify.py tests/test_mission_dual_write_journal_audit.py tests/test_mission_journal.py tests/test_mission_projection.py -> 71 passed

verification.pytest: exact suite 71 passed in 1.61s; core suite repeated three times with identical results
verification.ruff: ruff check changed Python files -> All checks passed
verification.web_build: npm --prefix web run build --if-present -> tsc and vite build passed
verification.verifier_clean: mission_dual_write_verify.py against isolated legacy session -> checked=1, error_count=0, not_found=0, exit 0
verification.malformed_journal: verifier exit 1 with error_count=1; journal audit exit 1 with invalid_json=1 and error_count=0
verification.malformed_run_metadata: verifier exit 1 with error_count=1 and result severity=error; read_run_meta compatibility behavior unchanged
verification.truncated_journal: live TestClient read-model returned HTTP 200/state READY_TO_EXECUTE after torn-tail recovery; journal lock file present and tail truncated
verification.live_api: isolated uvicorn on 127.0.0.1:8880 + curl GET /api/sessions/curl-session/mission/read-model returned HTTP 200 and migrated=true/source=mission_journal/state=READY_TO_EXECUTE/operational_status=READY/phase_label=READY

contract.compatibility: legacy_phase and legacy payload fields retained; migrated overview phase_label is normalized operational_status

adversarial_probes.malformed_input: covered by malformed journal audit and malformed run.json verifier error tests; both CLI paths exit 1 with explicit counters
adversarial_probes.stale_state: covered by projection/read-model phase-label integration regression
adversarial_probes.dirty_worktree: pre-existing parent edits observed; no unrelated files reverted
adversarial_probes.long_running_or_hung_command: not applicable; no new subprocess or retry loop
adversarial_probes.misleading_success_output: malformed verifier/audit reports exit 1 despite duplicate_count=0
adversarial_probes.flaky_tests: targeted suite repeated three times without variance
adversarial_probes.mid_operation_interruption: torn JSONL tail recovery exercised through read-model API

cleanup: isolated uvicorn processes, temporary sessions, curl captures, and malformed fixtures removed; no listener left on ports 8879/8880
